data_source: First-party intake + student profile (Module 1) + niche synthesis. Live site blocked by allowlist in this environment. All business facts sourced directly from Katleho Mohlomi via the discovery interview and factory brief.

company.name: Millionaire Contracts
company.description: Managed rep placement and sales infrastructure for founder-led businesses. Builds outbound systems, sales playbooks, CRM logic, outreach sequences, and lead flow mapping so founders stop being the only salesperson in their company.

business_hours: Not applicable. Remote-first, async-first business. No published office hours.

services.name: Assigned SDR Placement
services.body: A vetted, briefed outbound rep placed inside your sales function. Rep is briefed on your ICP, your playbook, and your outreach sequences before the first call. Deployed within 14 days.

services.name: Sales Playbook Build
services.body: A documented sales playbook: ICP definition, discovery framework, objection handling, sequence scripts, and pipeline stage criteria. Built in week one so the rep hits the ground running.

services.name: Outbound System Build
services.body: Full outbound infrastructure: CRM configuration, email sequence setup, LinkedIn outreach logic, lead list build, and tracking. Everything in place before outreach begins.

services.name: Pipeline Management
services.body: Ongoing management of the outbound pipeline: weekly Monday reports, reply handling, meeting scheduling, and live CRM dashboard access. Founder stays in the loop without managing the day-to-day.

case_studies.detail: Full outbound system built from zero. 120 qualified appointments booked.
DM-to-booked-call system built. Conversion rate improved 2.4x.

reviews.note: No public review profiles found at this stage. MC is early in its web presence build.

founder.name: Katleho Mohlomi
founder.title: Founder
founder.bio_summary: Former sales infrastructure lead across 15+ named B2B clients in SaaS, health, legal, fintech, and private equity. Built outbound systems, managed rep placement, and ran full-cycle sales across companies including Skayle 360, Eads Bridge Holdings, and iLawyer Marketing. Katleho founded Millionaire Contracts to productize the infrastructure build he had delivered for others as a repeatable managed service.

specialOffers.guarantee_detail: If month two ends without a single meeting booked, we extend at no cost until we hit the target.

brandGuidelines.note: No formal brand guide. Design derived from existing site visual language and niche defaults.

pricing.note: Pricing not published on existing site. Recommend anchoring with a starting price per niche playbook guidance.
